table_level_page_corruption.description: Snapshot opens, but one or more tables export as partial because corrupt B-tree pages abort bulk reads.

duckdb_unopenable_sqlite.description: DuckDB cannot attach the SQLite image; only sqlite3 salvage may recover rows.

post_prune_residue.description: Tiny archive residue under 10 MiB. These snapshots need a separate validation pass before publication.

lane_policy.publish_selection: compressed_bytes >= publish_min_bytes and snapshot_id not in quarantined_snapshots
lane_policy.recovery_selection: snapshot_id in quarantined_snapshots or compressed_bytes < tiny_residue_max_bytes
